_template: Capability lane for bounded retirement of stale local agent-os worktrees. Copy into evyverse-authority only through the signed authority workflow.

required: provider issue or PR proving worktree branch is merged, closed, or gone
clean git status readback for every target
recovery command for each removed worktree
forbidden: raw local absolute paths in provider-visible comments

commands: governedExecute receipt readback for each worktree-retire effect
mustConfirm: target path stayed under the declared worktree root
target branch provider state is merged, closed, or gone
worktree had no tracked or untracked local changes
post-run worktree list no longer contains the target alias

rules: publish path aliases instead of full local absolute paths
publish branch names, provider records, receipt ids, and recovery commands only
never publish credential material or local tool auth files

recovery.command: git worktree add <path-alias> <branch> and restore any provider artifact named in the receipt
